retrieved_result: Elastic Sky The VCP 5 exam is a demanding 85 multiple choice questions in 90 minutes. The exam uses a scaled scoring method (some questions count more than others), a passing grade is 300 out of a maximum of 500Like similar vendor exams you can go back and forward through the questions until you submit your ans
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses VCP 5 exam content, not IDEs; no content about integrated development environments or software development tools.
